title: Tier-one example-collector signal payload
description: The payload body of a tier-one signal event emitted by the example collector. Carried inside the §7b event envelope on the signal.tier-one.example-collector topic. This is the synthetic signal exercised by the Stage 0 acceptance round-trip (PRD §8.2); first-party signal collectors land their real payload schemas in Stage 1.

domain_id.description: The domain the observation concerns; also the topic partition key (PRD §7b).

signal_class.description: The signal class — for example 'dns' or 'content' (§7a evidence.signal_class).

source_url.description: The per-source-URL granularity key for content-derived signals (§7a evidence_current natural key). Empty string when not source-URL scoped.

observed_at.description: When the observation was made (§7a evidence.observed_at).

observed_value.description: The observed value, a free-form JSON object (§7a evidence.observed_value is jsonb).
